innateAbility.name: Sanguivore
innateAbility.description: The seeker applies a lifesteal-based heal on itself corresponding to the max health of the killed unit.Denying allied heroes heal for the same amount.

abilities.name: Bloodrage
abilities.description: Grants self bonus attack speed and outgoing spell damage amplification at the cost of a percentage of his max health per second.

abilities.name: Blood Rite
abilities.description: The ritual completes after a delay, applying silence while damaging any enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Thirst
abilities.description: Sensing blood of the mortally wounded, Bloodseeker gains bonus movement speed when an enemy hero's health falls below a certain threshold, with the bonuses increasing as their health falls further.These insatiable bonuses stack per hero.

abilities.name: Rupture
abilities.description: Deals an initial damage based on the unit-targeted enemy's current health. If the unit moves, it additionally takes damage based on the distance moved.

talents.right: -0.7% Bloodrage Max Health Damage per Second
